reportedIssues: The fixed bottom navigation bar is covering the lower portion of the game grid, with the last row of cards partially hidden behind it.
The rightmost game cards in the grids are cut off at the screen edge, leaving only a partial view of the third column.
The top category tab text is truncated on the right side (for example, 'Hot Ga...'), making the label look unfinished.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a highlighted category or Jackpots-specific selection problem; all reported issues concern layout and text truncation issues.
